controls.control_objective: To ensure be termed as the reserve bank of india (trade receivables discounting system) directions, 2026 and shall be effective immediately
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be termed as the Reserve Bank of India (Trade
Receivables Discounting System) Directions, 2026 and shall be effective
immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be termed as the reserve bank of india (trade receivables discounting system) directions, 2026 and shall be effective immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description:
(iii) Factoring Unit - refers to trade receivable in the form of invoice / bill uploaded
either by the seller (in the case of factoring) or by buyer (in case of reverse
factoring), as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek authorisation for setting up and operating treds platform in accordance with the rbi's master direction on 'authorisation to operate a payment sy
controls.control_description:
An entity shall seek authorisation for setting up and operating TReDS platform in
accordance with the RBI's Master Direction on 'Authorisation to operate a
Payment System.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek authorisation for setting up and operating treds platform in accordance with the rbi's master direction on 'authorisation to operate a payment sy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a company incorporated in india and registered under the companies act
controls.control_description:
The entity must be a company incorporated in India and registered under the
Companies Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a company incorporated in india and registered under the companies act

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the proposed activity of operating as a treds platform
controls.control_description:
The Memorandum of Association of the entity must cover the
proposed activity of operating as a TReDS platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the proposed activity of operating as a treds platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply along with a 'no objection certificate' from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the no objection certificate
controls.control_description:
An entity regulated by any of the financial sector regulator(s) shall apply along
with a 'No Objection Certificate' from such regulator(s), within 45 days of
obtaining the no objection certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply along with a 'no objection certificate' from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the no objection certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the consolidated fdi policy of the government of india and the relevant foreign exchange management regulations on this subject
controls.control_description:
An entity having Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) shall be guided by the
Consolidated FDI policy of the Government of India and the relevant foreign
exchange management regulations on this subject.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the consolidated fdi policy of the government of india and the relevant foreign exchange management regulations on this subject

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore and shall submit a certificate in the format (as provided in master directions on authorisation to operate a pay
controls.control_description:
An applicant shall have a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore and shall submit a
certificate in the format (as provided in Master Directions on Authorisation to
operate a Payment System dated June 15, 2026) from its statutory auditor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to have a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore and shall submit a certificate in the format (as provided in master directions on authorisation to operate a pay

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that net- worth criterion is met latest by march 31, 2028
controls.control_description:
Existing entities authorised to operate TReDS platform shall ensure that net-
worth criterion is met latest by March 31, 2028.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that net- worth criterion is met latest by march 31, 2028

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description: The minimum net-worth shall be maintained on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure bring participants together for facilitating uploading, accepting, bidding, discounting, and settlement of the invoices / bills of sellers
controls.control_description:
The TReDS platform (hereinafter referred to as "platform") shall bring participants
together for facilitating uploading, accepting, bidding, discounting, and settlement
of the invoices / bills of sellers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bring participants together for facilitating uploading, accepting, bidding, discounting, and settlement of the invoices / bills of sellers

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a suitable mechanism to establish genuineness of the uploaded invoices / bills
controls.control_description:
It shall put in place a suitable mechanism to
establish genuineness of the uploaded invoices / bills.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a suitable mechanism to establish genuineness of the uploaded invoices / bills

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that participation related master agreement includes inter-alia the following stipulations:
controls.control_description:
The platform shall ensure that participation related Master agreement includes
inter-alia the following stipulations:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that participation related master agreement includes inter-alia the following stipulations:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no option for the buyer for set-offs with respect to quality of goods or otherwise
controls.control_description:
There shall be no option for the buyer for set-offs
with respect to quality of goods or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no option for the buyer for set-offs with respect to quality of goods or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure file the said assignment with the central registry (cersai), as provided under registration of assignment of receivables (reserve bank) regulations, 2
controls.control_description:
(iii) Since financing a transaction on TReDS will result in assignment of
receivables in favour of the financier, the platform shall file the said
assignment with the central registry (CERSAI), as provided under
Registration of Assignment of Receivables (Reserve Bank) Regulations,
2022 dated January 14, 2022 (as amended from time to time).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to file the said assignment with the central registry (cersai), as provided under registration of assignment of receivables (reserve bank) regulations, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake customer due diligence (cdd) of buyers in accordance with reserve bank of india (commercial banks - know your customer) directions, 2025, as
controls.control_description:
It shall undertake customer due diligence (CDD) of buyers in accordance with
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions,
2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake customer due diligence (cdd) of buyers in accordance with reserve bank of india (commercial banks - know your customer) directions, 2025, as

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place necessary validation mechanisms to ensure that seller is an msme, and funds due to seller are credited in the seller's bank account only
controls.control_description:
The platform shall put in place necessary validation mechanisms to ensure that
seller is an MSME, and funds due to seller are credited in the seller's bank
account only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place necessary validation mechanisms to ensure that seller is an msme, and funds due to seller are credited in the seller's bank account only

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate the discounting of factoring units by way of receiving bids from multiple financiers in a transparent manner, resulting in flow of funds to
controls.control_description:
It shall facilitate the discounting of factoring units by way of receiving bids from
multiple financiers in a transparent manner, resulting in flow of funds to the
sellers, providing intimation to banks holding working capital / cash credit
accounts of buyer and seller, serving of notice of assignment to buyer in favour
of financier, with final payment being made by the buyer to the financier on due
date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate the discounting of factoring units by way of receiving bids from multiple financiers in a transparent manner, resulting in flow of funds to

controls.control_objective: To ensure also enable further discounting / re-discounting of the discounted factoring units by the financiers, resulting in its assignment in favour of other f
controls.control_description:
It may also enable further discounting / re-discounting of the discounted factoring
units by the financiers, resulting in its assignment in favour of other financiers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also enable further discounting / re-discounting of the discounted factoring units by the financiers, resulting in its assignment in favour of other f

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to relevant1 instructions issued by rbi, as applicable
controls.control_description:
Such transfers shall be subject to relevant1 instructions issued by RBI, as
applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to relevant1 instructions issued by rbi, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be "without recourse" to the sellers
controls.control_description:
Factoring units discounted under TReDS shall be "without recourse" to the
sellers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be "without recourse" to the sellers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsibility of treds
controls.control_description: Default, if any, by the buyer shall not be responsibility of TReDS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsibility of treds

controls.control_objective: To ensure avail insurance facility for treds transactions
controls.control_description:
Financiers may avail insurance facility for TReDS transactions, subject to the
following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avail insurance facility for treds transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied on the seller
controls.control_description: (i) Premium for insurance shall not be levied on the seller.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied on the seller

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a credit risk mitigant (crm) to avail any prudential benefits
controls.control_description:
(ii) Credit insurance shall not be treated as a Credit Risk Mitigant (CRM) to avail
any prudential benefits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a credit risk mitigant (crm) to avail any prudential benefits

controls.control_objective: To ensure avail guarantee in respect of factoring units from any credit guarantee fund trust setup by government of india
controls.control_description:
Financiers may avail guarantee in respect of factoring units from any credit
guarantee fund trust setup by Government of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avail guarantee in respect of factoring units from any credit guarantee fund trust setup by government of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in custody of all the master agreements
controls.control_description: The platform shall be in custody of all the Master agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in custody of all the master agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate efficient and seamless settlement of transactions between financier and seller for financing of trade receivables and between buyer and fin
controls.control_description:
The platform shall facilitate efficient and seamless settlement of transactions
between financier and seller for financing of trade receivables and between buyer
and financier on the due date, using any authorised payment system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate efficient and seamless settlement of transactions between financier and seller for financing of trade receivables and between buyer and fin

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit returns to rbi as listed in annexure to this md
controls.control_description: TReDS entity shall submit returns to RBI as listed in Annexure to this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit returns to rbi as listed in annexure to this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been granted under this master direction
controls.control_description:
(i) Notwithstanding such repeal, all authorisation / approvals granted, actions
taken, and acknowledgements issued under the aforesaid circulars /
guidelines shall continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been
granted under this Master Direction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been granted under this master direction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to have been in force until the date of coming into effect of this master direction
controls.control_description:
(ii) The circulars and guidelines so repealed shall be deemed to have been in
force until the date of coming into effect of this Master Direction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to have been in force until the date of coming into effect of this master direction
